criteria: 1M+ views (plays or views); a REAL person in an interview/podcast/keynote/conference talking about AI (its value, risks, disruption, or their own adoption) in ANY industry — the speaker need NOT be an AI or tech figure, any well-known speaker in any field counts; NOT already posted on @theaibolt (dedup by speaker+topic vs full history); duration preferred 30-90s but longer viral clips OK (cut at edit); recent preferred but evergreen older 1M+ clips accepted (age flagged). EXCLUDE AI-generated/CGI video, memes, faceless voiceover, text-overlay news, no-speaker demos.
status: 2026-07-24: @theaibolt full-history resweep (200-limit, 143/143 items) found ZERO new posts vs prior sweep - no pruning needed. @theaiaxon dedup (STEP 1b) run for the first time with real data: Apify scrape of @theaiaxon's own published reels returned exactly 1 post (fresh account) - Sam Altman/Tucker Carlson Show clip on ChatGPT child-safety guardrails, posted 2026-07-23, shortcode DbJvmxvPYPD. Metricool getScheduledPosts (brandId 6566296, America/Chicago, 30d back/fwd) returned zero scheduled posts. Neither matched any backlog candidate or clips_log entry by speaker+topic, so no backlog items were pruned; the Sam Altman/Tucker Carlson/ChatGPT-child-safety topic is now recorded below as an exclusion so it is never resourced. Dedup this run: CLEAN (both @theaiaxon calls succeeded, no errors). Discovery: ran 6 X/Twitter searches (api-ninja/x-twitter-advanced-search: Ilya Sutskever, Yann LeCun, Bill Gates, Peter Thiel, doctor AI diagnosis, lawyer AI replace) and 5 Instagram keyword searches (data-slayer/instagram-search-reels: Andrew Ng, musician AI, economist AI jobs, Fei-Fei Li, athlete AI) covering untried Tier 2/3 speakers and untried cross-industry fields (medicine, law, music, economics, sports). All 11 actor runs SUCCEEDED (no quota/auth errors) but yielded ZERO net-new qualifying clips: every result was either under the 1M-view gate, lacked an actual video attachment (text/quote-tweet commentary about an interview rather than the interview clip itself, e.g. the 1.99M-view Marc Andreessen/Rogan thread), or was off-topic. Closest near-misses: Andrew Ng bio explainer at 984K views (just under gate, and format is narrated bio-reel not a direct interview clip); economist AI-jobs explainer at 2.19M views (narrator/no on-camera named speaker, fails spoken-words+format test). This confirms the 2026-07-09/07-22 account-and-speaker exhaustion finding now extends to this wider net of untried names and industries. Available remains at 28/100, well short of the 90-alert threshold. Recommend for a future run: (a) the still-untried Priority-1 lever of mining full source interviews behind theaibolt's 143 posts, (b) reviewing the 500K-1M 'review'-bucket clips already in the pool per the 2026-07-09 STATUS note before further relaxing the 1M gate (ask user first, never silently relax).
